functions.name: mlops_observation.calculator.classification_performance.calculate_confusion_by_classes
documentation:
Calculate metrics:
\- TP (true positive)
\- TN (true negative)
\- FP (false positive)
\- FN (false negative)
for each class from confusion matrix.

Returns:

: a dict like:

  ```
  {
      "class_1_name": {
          "tp": 1,
          "tn": 5,
          "fp": 0,
          "fn": 3,
      },
      "class_1_name": {
          "tp": 1,
          "tn": 5,
          "fp": 0,
          "fn": 3,
      },
  }
  ```

functions.name: mlops_observation.metric_results.data_drift.numerical_feature_drift.get_one_numeric_column_drift
documentation:
Tính toán các metric cho numeric feature, return kết quả các value của:
- Jensen Shanon Divergence
- Kolmogorov Smirnov
- Wasserstein Distance Norm

functions.name: mlops_observation.metric_results.data_drift.categorical_feature_drift.get_one_categorical_column_drift
documentation:
Tính toán các metric cho numeric feature, return kết quả các value của:
- Population stability index (PSI)
- Chi-square
- Cramer's V
